reply:
[[BLOCK:slide6_shape1]]
A student asked me how to improve their grades. I told them that my fifty-variable regression model could predict nearly 89% of exam performance: studying longer, earning more money, buying a reliable car, watching less TV, going online more frequently, exercising more, attending church more often, praying more, watching fewer movies, playing fewer video games, getting haircuts more frequently, drinking more milk and coffee... and so on.  
This complex model is completely useless!
